overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence from GTA V featuring a vehicle traveling on a rain-soaked highway, passing through a well-lit concrete tunnel, and continuing across an elevated bridge. The footage showcases the game's atmospheric lighting with streetlights reflecting off wet asphalt and heavy rain effects.

events.description: tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead
vehicle enters the illuminated tunnel portal

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the rain-soaked highway, approaching the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red brake lights visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail running parallel to the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail running parallel to the right side of the road
tall street light pole with orange sodium vapor lamp illuminating the road
large concrete tunnel entrance with internal lighting visible
rain-soaked asphalt road surface with reflective puddles and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a rain-soaked highway at night, with metal guardrails lining both sides and periodic streetlights casting orange glows on the wet pavement. The tunnel entrance looms ahead as the vehicle approaches, with distant traffic visible through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: transition from streetlight illumination to continuous tunnel ceiling lighting
vehicle overtakes a white sedan on the left side
approaching the tunnel exit, natural darkness visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel, maintaining speed and overtaking slower traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan being passed on the left side of the tunnel

entered.detail: curved concrete tunnel wall with horizontal construction seams
curved concrete tunnel wall with black and yellow chevron warning marks
continuous row of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
black and yellow diagonal striped warning markings on the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the concrete tunnel, the vehicle travels through warm artificial lighting that replaces the dark rainy exterior. The curved walls feature safety chevron markings, and the vehicle overtakes a white sedan before approaching the distant exit where the dark night sky reappears.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with concrete barriers

events.description: exits tunnel back into rainy night environment
passing under overhead highway sign structure
vehicle navigates gentle right curve on the elevated roadway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated highway, navigating gentle curves while following traffic through the rain

notable_agents.action: red car ahead maintaining steady speed with visible brake lights

entered.detail: solid concrete highway barrier replacing the metal guardrail
solid concrete highway barrier on the right side of the elevated road
large overhead gantry structure spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: Having exited the tunnel, the vehicle continues across an elevated highway bridge with solid concrete barriers. The heavy rain persists, with streetlights reflecting off the wet road surface. The vehicle follows a red car ahead, passing under overhead sign structures while navigating the gentle curves of the elevated roadway through the dark, rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched open highway through a brightly lit tunnel and back into a stormy night on an elevated bridge. It begins with the vehicle speeding along a wet road lined with metal guardrails, where orange streetlights pierce through a heavy downpour as a tunnel entrance looms ahead. As the vehicle enters the concrete tunnel, the dark rain is replaced by warm artificial lighting and curved walls marked with safety chevrons, during which the car overtakes a white sedan. The scene then shifts back to the rainy exterior as the vehicle exits the tunnel and ascends onto an elevated highway bridge with solid concrete barriers. Finally, the camera follows a red car under overhead sign structures, navigating gentle curves while streetlights reflect off the shimmering, rain-soaked asphalt.
